title: [MTR] TGV 12
description: Adds the classic TGV 12 from Top Gear season 17
body:
Adds the TGV12 from Top Gear season 17. Featuring a red car and a modified caravan trailer behind labelled TGV 12. Time to hop in, strap your goggles and hit the gas pedal! SPEED AND POWER!!!


This pack is released for April Fools, hence no pack icon on the resource packs page. 

Many thanks to NAMCO. for taking amazing screenshots next to his trains!
